text: DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2014 In respect of The DIFC Courts Small Claims Tribunal (Members of the SCT)
FEBRUARY 06, 2014 COURT ADMINISTRATIVE ORDERS
I, Michael Hwang, of the Dubai International FinancialChief Justice (/glossary/chief-justice/)
Centre , Courts (/glossary/court/)
Having reviewed —
Dubai Law No. 9 of 2004 in respect of the establishment of the , as amended by DIFC (/glossary/difc/) Law No. 7 and 14 of 2011;
Dubai Law No. 12 of 2004 in respect of the Judicial Authority at the DIFC, as amended by Law No 16 of 2011;
DIFC Law No. 10 of 2004 in respect of the (“DIFC Courts Law”);DIFC Courts (/glossary/difc-courts/)
DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 establishing the Small Claims (“SCT”);Tribunal (/glossary/tribunal/)
DIFC Courts Order No. 1 of 2010 — Limits of ; Jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)
Practice Direction No. 2 of 2010 — SCT ; andJudge (/glossary/judge/)
Part 53 of the of the DIFC CourtsRules (/glossary/rules/)
And Whereas —

(A) The DIFC Courts Law authorises the Chief Justice of the DIFC Courts, where he considers it appropriate, to set up and administer Tribunals of the DIFC Courts, and to authorise for their administration, which shall be set out in the Rules of rules (/glossary/rules/) (Article 14(3)).Court (/glossary/court/)
(B) The SCT was established pursuant to DIFC Courts Order No. 2 of 2007 issued by Chief Justice Sir Anthony Evans.

(C) The Rules of the DIFC Courts (the “RDC”) have been enacted by His Highness The of Dubai pursuant to Article 31(1) of the Ruler (/glossary/ruler/) Court Law (/glossary/court-law/) and contain at Part 53 the rules relating to the SCT; and
(D) The SCT is recognised as a mechanism for the prompt and cost-effi cient hearing and determination of claims within the of the DIFC Courts.jurisdiction (/glossary/jurisdiction/)
Now I hereby order and direct as follows
(1) Judicial Offi cers Maha Al Mehairi and Nassir Al Nasser shall be appointed as members of the SCT.

(2) This Order shall take effect from the date of signature. Order No. 2 of 2007 shall remain in full force and effect save as amended by this Order. This Order shall be known as The DIFC Small Claims Tribunal (Members of the SCT) Order, Order No. 1 of 2014.
Chief Justice Michael Hwang
Dated: 06 February 2014
